query: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'Boonphone' AND overpaid > 0 AND principal = 0 AND interest = 0 AND fee = 0; SELECT overpaid, principal, interest, fee, total_amount, period, is_bad_debt_row FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'Boonphone' AND overpaid > 0 LIMIT 5; SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt_overpaid FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'Boonphone' AND overpaid > 0;
